description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with three above-ground stories and a partially exposed interior, revealing open-plan living spaces and a central staircase. The exterior is predominantly white with large, dark-framed windows arranged in vertical rows, providing ample natural light. The roof is a combination of a steep gable and flat sections, giving the structure a contemporary yet classic silhouette. The main entryway is understated, with a single door at ground level and no prominent porch or decorative columns. The interior floors are finished with wood, and the structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements. The house sits on a black platform, suggesting an urban lot or shared driveway context.
description: A modern, three-story house with a mix of gable and flat roofs, large vertical windows, and a minimalist entryway, featuring open interior spaces and wood flooring.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's cutaway interior, revealing three stories, a central staircase, open wood-floored rooms, and the gable roof structure.
description_view_1: This view displays the rear or side facade with three vertical rows of windows and a simple ground-level door, emphasizing the building's height and symmetry.
description_view_2: This view highlights the gable roof and the solid, windowless side wall, with minimal architectural detailing visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the side of the house with a partial cutaway, exposing the wood-floored interior and the black platform base.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist ground-level door with no porch or decorative elements
